item.name: Pet
POST /pet: Add a new pet to the store
PET-1 Pet creation with all valid fields
PET-2 Pet creation with valid required field and optional fields with null value
PET-3 Pet creation with min.required field (name only)
PET-4 Pet creation with "pending" value in "Status" field
PET-5 Pet creation with "sold" value in "Status" field
PET-6 Pet creation with valid min. name length (1 character)
PET-7 Pet creation with valid min. name length+1 (2 characters)
PET-8 Pet creation with valid max. name length -1 (254 characters)
PET-9 Pet creation with valid max. name length (255 characters)
PET-10 Pet creation with multiple tags
PET-11 Pet creation with empty array in "photoUrls" field
PET-12 Pet creation with large numeric ID
PET-13 Pet creation with numeric ID sent as string
PET-14 Pet creation with zero as ID
PET-15 Pet creation with multiple photo URLs
PET-16 Pet creation with boolean value in "name" field
PET-17 Pet creation with missing required field "name"
PET-18 Pet creation with null value in required field "name"
PET-19 Pet creation with empty string in required field "name"
PET-20 Pet creation with only whitespaces value in required field "name"
PET-21 Pet creation with exceeding max. length in "name" field (256 characters)
PET-22 Pet creation with integer value instead of a string value in "name" field
PET-23 Pet creation with numeric string in "name" field (digits only)
PET-24 Pet creation with URL value in "name" field
PET- 25 Pet creation with special characters and digits in "name" field
PET-27 Pet creation with invalid data type in "id" field (string instead of number)
PET-28 Pet creation with null value in "id" field
PET-29 Pet creation with negative value in "id" field
PET-30 Pet creation with boolean value in "id" field
PET-31 Pet creation with floating-point value in "id" field
PET-32 Pet creation with empty string value in "id" field
PET-33 Pet creation with mixed numeric string in "id" field
PET-34 Pet creation with string value in "photoUrls" field
PET-35 Pet creation with object value instead of an array in "photoUrls" field
PET-36 Pet creation with integer value instead of an array in photoUrls field
PET-37 Pet creation with empty string instead of array in "photoUrls" field
PET-38 Pet creation with boolean instead of an array in photoUrls field
PET-39 Pet creation with mixed data types in "photoUrls" array
PET-40 Pet creation with object inside "photoUrls" array
PET-41 Pet creation with null element inside "tags" array
PET-42 Pet creation with empty string instead of array in "tags" field
PET-43 Pet creation with empty string element inside "tags" array
PET-44 Pet creation with string instead of integer in "id" field inside "tags" array
PET-45 Pet creation with integer instead of string in "name" field inside "tags" array
PET-46 Pet creation with empty object inside "tags" array
PET-47 Pet creation with tag object containing only "name" field (missing "id")
PET-48 Pet creation with empty string instead of object in "category" field
PET-49 Pet creation with empty object in "category" field
PET-50 Pet creation with boolean instead of object in "category" field
PET-51 Pet creation with array instead of object in "category" field
PET-52 Pet creation with integer instead of string in category "name" field
PET-53 Pet creation with string instead of integer in category "id" field
PET- 54 Pet creation with empty string instead of object in "category" field
PET-55 Pet creation with null in category "id" field
PET-56 Pet creation with null in category "name" field
PET-57 Pet creation with missing "id" field for "category" field
PET-58 Pet creation with missing "name" field for "category" field
PET-59 Pet creation with value not included in enum list in "status" field
PET-60 Pet creation with integer instead of string in "status" field
PET-61 Pet creation with boolean instead of string in "status" field
PET-62 Pet creation with empty string in "status" field
PET-63 Pet creation with whitespace in "status" field
GET/pet: Find a pet by ID
PET-64 Find a pet by valid pet ID
PET-65 Find a pet with string instead of integer in pet ID
PET-66 Find a pet with non-existing pet ID
PET-67 Find a pet with negative integer in pet ID
PUT/pet: Updating an existing pet
PET-68 Update pet with valid request body
PET-69 Update pet via PUT request and verify changes via GET request
PET-69 Verify changes via GET request
PET-70 Update only required fields of existing pet
PET-71 Update pet with string value in "id" field
PET-72 Update pet without "name" field
PET-73 Update pet with empty request body
PET-74 Update pet with null value in "name" field
PET-75 Update pet with value outside allowed enum in "status" field
DELETE/pet: Delete a pet
PET-76 Delete existing pet with valid pet ID
PET-76 Verify that pet is deleted via GET request
PET-77 Repeat DELETE request for already deleted pet
PET-78 Delete pet with non-existing pet ID
PET-79 Delete pet with string value instead of pet ID
PET-81 Delete pet without pet ID
